title: White Pumpkin Hat
description: Adds White Pumpkin from Minecraft Story Mode
body:
## **ABOUT:**
This resource pack adds white pumpkin from Minecraft Story Mode by renaming carved pumpkin to "White Pumpkin". 
## **COMPATIBILITY:**
Minecraft: Java Edition 1.21.5+ is supported.

Optional: [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home).
## **SCREENSHOTS:**
![White Pumpkin on Steve](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7hZpSYlR/images/6b4339650c7071c784020d7efc30aaad61cbb519.png)
